tasks.title: Update IconProps interface and add IconWeight type export
tasks.description:
Update `packages/icons/src/types.ts` to align with Phosphor's prop interface:
1. Add `IconWeight` type: `'thin' | 'light' | 'regular' | 'bold' | 'fill' | 'duotone'`
2. Change `IconProps` to extend `React.SVGAttributes<SVGSVGElement>` instead of using `[key: string]: unknown` catch-all
3. Add `weight?: IconWeight` prop (default: 'regular')
4. Add `mirrored?: boolean` prop (default: false)
5. Keep existing props: `size`, `color`, `className`, `aria-label`
6. Export `IconWeight` type from `index.ts`

Test requirements:
- Unit test: verify IconProps accepts weight and mirrored
- Unit test: verify ICON_SIZES constant unchanged
- Unit test: verify IconWeight type exported correctly
- Test file: `packages/icons/test/types.test.ts`

subtasks.title: Add weight and mirrored props to IconProps

tasks.title: Create createIconComponent factory utility
tasks.description:
Create a `packages/icons/src/create-icon.ts` factory function that:
1. Accepts icon SVG paths/content and returns a properly typed React component
2. Handles named size resolution (xs/sm/md/lg/xl -> pixel values via ICON_SIZES)
3. Destructures `weight` and `mirrored` from props (ignores them until Phase 3)
4. Spreads remaining props onto the SVG element safely
5. Handles `aria-label` and `aria-hidden` accessibility attributes
6. Sets default values: size='md', color='currentColor'

This factory will be used by the codemod (T-003) to update all 386 existing icons and by future Phosphor wrappers (Phase 3).

Test requirements:
- Unit test: factory produces valid React component
- Unit test: size resolution works for all named sizes and numeric values
- Unit test: weight and mirrored are destructured and not passed to SVG
- Unit test: aria-label and aria-hidden work correctly
- Test file: `packages/icons/test/create-icon.test.tsx`

subtasks.title: Destructure weight and mirrored from props

tasks.title: Write codemod script to update existing icon components
tasks.description:
SUPERSEDED: Migration done directly via createPhosphorIcon instead of codemod approach. Create a Node.js script at `packages/icons/scripts/codemod-icons.js` that:
1. Reads all icon component files in `packages/icons/src/icons/**/*.tsx`
2. For each file, updates the component to use the `createIconComponent` factory OR updates the manual pattern to destructure `weight` and `mirrored` from props
3. Ensures `weight` and `mirrored` are NOT spread onto the SVG element
4. Preserves all existing SVG path data and attributes
5. Handles the consistent pattern used across all 386 icons
6. Runs a dry-run mode to preview changes before applying

Test requirements:
- Unit test: codemod correctly transforms a sample icon component
- Unit test: dry-run mode produces correct output without modifying files
- Unit test: SVG content is preserved after transformation
- Test file: `packages/icons/test/codemod.test.ts`

tasks.title: Run codemod on all 386 existing icon components
tasks.description:
SUPERSEDED: Icons migrated directly to Phosphor wrappers instead of codemod approach. Execute the codemod script (T-003) on all existing icon components:
1. Run dry-run first and review output
2. Apply codemod to all `packages/icons/src/icons/**/*.tsx` files
3. Run typecheck to verify all components still compile
4. Run existing tests to verify no regressions
5. Verify a sample of icons render correctly

This is a mechanical execution task - the script does the work.

Test requirements:
- Run `pnpm typecheck` in packages/icons
- Run `pnpm test` in packages/icons
- Spot-check 5 icons from different categories render correctly

tasks.title: Update package unit tests for new props interface
tasks.description:
Update/create tests in `packages/icons/test/` to cover the new IconProps interface:
1. Test that `weight` prop is accepted by icon components
2. Test that `mirrored` prop is accepted by icon components
3. Test that `weight` and `mirrored` are NOT passed to the SVG DOM element
4. Test that extending SVGAttributes works (onClick, style, etc.)
5. Test backward compatibility - all existing prop patterns still work
6. Update `basic.test.tsx` if needed

Test files:
- `packages/icons/test/basic.test.tsx` (update)
- `packages/icons/test/props.test.tsx` (new)

subtasks.title: Test weight prop acceptance and DOM exclusion
Test mirrored prop acceptance and DOM exclusion

tasks.title: Update @repo/icons documentation for new props
tasks.description:
Update documentation to reflect the new IconProps interface:
1. Update `packages/icons/CLAUDE.md` - add weight and mirrored props
2. Update `packages/icons/README.md` - add new props to API reference
3. Update `packages/icons/docs/api/usage-reference.md`
4. Add note that weight/mirrored are accepted but not yet functional (until Phase 3)
5. Document IconWeight type and available values

No test requirements (documentation only). NOTE: Covered comprehensively by T-053 documentation update.

subtasks.title: Add note about weight/mirrored not yet functional

tasks.title: Create Lucide-to-@repo/icons mapping audit
tasks.description:
Create a mapping document that maps every unique Lucide icon used in `apps/admin/` to its `@repo/icons` equivalent:
1. List all ~87 unique Lucide icons imported in admin
2. For each, check if an equivalent already exists in `@repo/icons` (possibly under a different name)
3. Categorize into: (a) already exists - just change import, (b) needs to be added
4. For icons to be added, determine which `@repo/icons` category they belong to
5. Output a mapping table as a markdown file at `.claude/tasks/SPEC-008-phosphor-icons-migration/icon-mapping.md`

This is a research/audit task. No code changes.

No test requirements (audit document only).

tasks.title: Align admin Icon.tsx ICON_SIZES with package ICON_SIZES
tasks.description:
Resolve the sizing mismatch between admin's `Icon.tsx` and `@repo/icons`:

Current admin sizes (Tailwind classes): xs='h-3 w-3', sm='h-4 w-4', md='h-5 w-5', lg='h-6 w-6', xl='h-8 w-8', 2xl='h-10 w-10'
Package sizes (pixels): xs=16, sm=20, md=24, lg=28, xl=32

Approach:
1. Import ICON_SIZES from '@repo/icons' in Icon.tsx
2. Use the pixel values from the package to set width/height on the underlying component
3. Apply Tailwind classes via className for consistent layout integration
4. Keep the admin-specific `variant` and `decorative` props
5. Keep the `2xl` size in admin only (not in package)
6. Verify all admin `<Icon>` usages still render at correct sizes

Test requirements:
- Typecheck passes
- Visual verification: Icon sizes match before and after change

subtasks.title: Update Icon.tsx to use pixel-based sizing
Maintain Tailwind class application for layout
Verify all Icon usages render correctly

4. Run `pnpm typecheck` in apps/admin - must pass
5. Run `pnpm build` in apps/admin - must succeed
6. Run `pnpm test` in apps/admin if tests exist

This is a gate task - confirms all admin Lucide migration is complete.

tasks.description:
Clean up unused icon dependencies across packages:
1. Remove `lucide-react` from `packages/auth-ui/package.json` (confirmed zero imports)
2. Run `grep -r "lucide-react" packages/` to verify no other packages use it
3. Run `grep -r "lucide-react" apps/web2/` to verify web2 doesn't use it
4. Run `pnpm install` to update lockfile
5. Verify `packages/auth-ui` builds successfully

Test requirements:
- No lucide-react imports found outside apps/web/ (deprecated)
- auth-ui builds without lucide-react

subtasks.title: Audit all packages for lucide-react usage

tasks.title: Create complete CurrentIconName to PhosphorIconName mapping table
tasks.description:
SUPERSEDED: Mapping was done directly in code during migration, no separate table needed. Create a comprehensive mapping document for the Phosphor migration:
1. List ALL icons currently exported from `@repo/icons` (386+ original + newly added)
2. For each, find the Phosphor equivalent from `@phosphor-icons/react`
3. Categorize into: (a) direct match, (b) close match with different name, (c) no match - keep as custom SVG
4. Document visual differences for close matches
5. Output mapping table at `.claude/tasks/SPEC-008-phosphor-icons-migration/phosphor-mapping.md`

Use Phosphor's icon catalog at https://phosphoricons.com/ for reference.

This is the most complex research task in the spec. Take time to be thorough.

No test requirements (research document only).

subtasks.title: Export full list of @repo/icons icon names
Map system and admin icons to Phosphor
Map amenities and features icons to Phosphor

tasks.title: Add @phosphor-icons/react dependency and create Phosphor wrapper factory
tasks.description:
Set up the Phosphor integration infrastructure:
1. Add `@phosphor-icons/react` to `packages/icons/package.json` as dependency
2. Run `pnpm install`
3. Create `packages/icons/src/create-phosphor-icon.ts` factory function that:
   - Accepts a Phosphor icon component and export name
   - Returns a component that maps @repo/icons IconProps to Phosphor props
   - Handles named size resolution (xs/sm/md/lg/xl -> pixels)
   - Passes `weight` and `mirrored` to Phosphor component
   - Handles `color`, `className`, `aria-label`
4. Export factory from internal module (not from public API)

Test requirements:
- Unit test: factory produces valid component from Phosphor icon
- Unit test: size mapping works correctly
- Unit test: weight and mirrored pass through to Phosphor
- Test file: `packages/icons/test/phosphor-wrapper.test.tsx`

tasks.title: Migrate system category icons to Phosphor wrappers (~51 icons)
tasks.description:
Replace custom SVG implementations in `packages/icons/src/icons/system/` with Phosphor wrappers:
1. Using the mapping table (T-036), replace each system icon's implementation
2. Use `createPhosphorIcon` factory from T-037
3. Maintain the same export name and file path
4. For icons with no Phosphor equivalent, keep as custom SVG
5. Run tests after each batch of replacements

System icons include: HomeIcon, SearchIcon, MenuIcon, CloseIcon, AddIcon, UserIcon, SettingsIcon, LoaderIcon, AlertTriangleIcon, etc.

Test requirements:
- All existing icon tests still pass
- Typecheck passes
- Icons render correctly

tasks.title: Wire up weight and mirrored props in Phosphor wrapper factory
tasks.description:
Now that all icons use the Phosphor wrapper factory, ensure `weight` and `mirrored` props actually work:
1. Update `createPhosphorIcon` to pass `weight` to Phosphor component (should already be done in T-037)
2. Update `createPhosphorIcon` to pass `mirrored` to Phosphor component
3. Verify that custom SVG icons (those without Phosphor equivalents) gracefully ignore these props
4. Update any remaining tests

This task ensures the weight/mirrored props are no longer no-ops.

Test requirements:
- Unit test: weight='bold' produces visually different SVG output than weight='thin'
- Unit test: mirrored=true produces flipped SVG
- Unit test: custom SVG icons don't break with weight/mirrored props
- Test file: `packages/icons/test/phosphor-props.test.tsx`

subtasks.title: Verify weight prop passes through to Phosphor
Verify custom SVGs handle these props gracefully

tasks.title: Create visual verification comparison page
tasks.description:
Create a comparison page to verify Phosphor icons match the expected visual style:
1. Update or create `apps/web/src/pages/icons.astro` (or equivalent in web2) that shows ALL icons
2. For each icon, show: icon name, old appearance (if screenshots available), new Phosphor rendering
3. Show icons in all weight variants: thin, light, regular, bold, fill, duotone
4. Show icons in all named sizes: xs, sm, md, lg, xl
5. Flag any icons that look significantly different from the original

This is for stakeholder review before removing old SVG files.

Test requirements:
- Page renders without errors
- All icons display correctly in all variants

subtasks.title: Display all icons with weight variants
Display all icons with size variants

tasks.title: Remove old SVG source files after visual verification
tasks.description:
SUPERSEDED: Icons were replaced in-place with Phosphor wrappers, no old SVG files remain. After visual verification is approved, remove the old custom SVG code:
1. For each icon that was migrated to Phosphor, the old SVG paths/content in the component file should have been replaced by the wrapper. Verify no dead SVG code remains.
2. Remove any leftover SVG path data that is no longer referenced
3. Clean up any unused imports
4. Run full test suite to verify nothing broke
5. Run build to verify package still works

Test requirements:
- Full test suite passes
- Package builds successfully
- No dead SVG code in migrated icon files

tasks.title: Remove lucide-react from root pnpm-lock.yaml and verify clean install
tasks.description: Remove lucide-react from the monorepo where possible. NOTE: apps/web (deprecated but still in dev pipeline) has 4 files importing lucide-react: select.tsx, BugReportForm.tsx, FileUploadZone.tsx, ThankYouMessage.tsx. Options: (a) migrate these 4 files to @repo/icons, (b) keep lucide in apps/web only, (c) skip until apps/web is fully deprecated. The pnpm-lock.yaml still references lucide-react for apps/web. RESOLUTION: apps/web is deprecated (replaced by apps/web2). lucide-react kept only for apps/web, no action needed.

tasks.title: Remove generate-icon.js script and old generation documentation
tasks.description:

2. Update `packages/icons/docs/guides/adding-icons.md` to document how to add icons using Phosphor wrappers
3. Remove any references to the generate script in documentation
4. Update any npm scripts in package.json that reference the generate script

No test requirements (tooling removal + doc update).

tasks.title: Update CLAUDE.md files across monorepo for Phosphor migration
tasks.description:
Update project documentation to reflect the completed migration:
1. Update `packages/icons/CLAUDE.md` - document Phosphor as the icon source, weight system, adding new icons
2. Update `packages/icons/README.md` - full API reference with weight and mirrored props
3. Update root `CLAUDE.md` if it references icon patterns
4. Update `apps/admin/CLAUDE.md` if it references icon usage
5. Update any docs that reference Lucide as the icon source

No test requirements (documentation only).

subtasks.title: Search for and update any remaining Lucide references

tasks.title: Run final bundle size analysis and document results
tasks.description:
Perform a final bundle size analysis to verify the migration didn't increase bundle size:
1. Build `@repo/icons` package and measure output size
2. Build `apps/admin` and measure bundle size (compare to pre-migration if baseline available)
3. Build `apps/web2` and measure bundle size
4. Verify tree-shaking works (import a single icon and verify only that icon is bundled)
5. Document results in `.claude/tasks/SPEC-008-phosphor-icons-migration/bundle-analysis.md`

Test requirements:
- Tree-shaking verification: single icon import doesn't pull entire library
- Bundle size should be roughly neutral (within 10% of pre-migration) RESULTS: ESM 71KB, CJS 94KB, DTS 35KB. @phosphor-icons/react kept external. 394 individual Phosphor imports enable tree-shaking at consumer level.

subtasks.title: Build and measure admin bundle size
